instruction:
Refactor the existing tests for `to_words` to follow better testing practices.


Current test patterns to refactor:
- test_that at tests/testthat/test-case.R:52


Goals:
1. Use describe()/it() blocks for better organization where appropriate
2. Reduce code duplication with helper functions or local fixtures
3. Improve test descriptions to be specific about what behavior is verified
4. Extract common setup into withr::local_* fixtures
5. Each test should have a single responsibility
context:
Package: stringr v1.6.0.9000
Description: Simple, Consistent Wrappers for Common String Operations
Function: to_words
Parameters: string
Test patterns used: test_that
Expectations used: expect_equal

Function Code:
```r
to_words <- function(string) {
  breakpoints <- paste(
    # non-word characters
    "[^\\p{L}\\p{N}]+",
    # lowercase followed by uppercase
    "(?<=\\p{Ll})(?=\\p{Lu})",
    # letter followed by number
    "(?<=\\p{L})(?=\\p{N})",
    # number followed by letter
    "(?<=\\p{N})(?=\\p{L})",
    # uppercase followed uppercase then lowercase (i.e. end of acronym)
    "(?<=\\p{Lu})(?=\\p{Lu}\\p{Ll})",
    sep = "|"
  )
  out <- str_replace_all(string, breakpoints, " ")
  out <- str_to_lower(out)
  str_trim(out)
}
```
